statement.p: To kill bedbug eggs using heat, they must be exposed to at least 118^{\circ}F for at least 90 minutes. If you only know the Celsius temperature C\text{,} then to kill the eggs means we have the inequality \frac{9}{5}C+32\geq118\text{.} You have some infested blankets that you put in a sauna for 90 minutes, but the sauna temperature is 55^{\circ}C\text{.} Was this hot enough to kill the eggs?
